# Architecture

::: {.callout-note}
TODO: Phased orchestrator diagram, two-pipeline structure (SOI-current vs legacy),
checkpoint + flag flow.
:::

## Two pipelines

- `R/run_pipeline.R` — SOI-current extracts, 2012+.
- `R/run_legacy_pipeline.R` — raw legacy NCCS files (PZ + PF), 1989-2011. Built later.

## Phase ordering

Download → Unpack → Pre-checks → Harmonize → Combined → Post-checks → Dictionary →
Quality report → Promote → Upload.
